name: PureYoga
tagline: Find your balance. Discover your strength.
description: A sanctuary of movement and mindfulness in the heart of the city.

hero.heading: Find stillness within movement
hero.subheading: Expert-led yoga classes for all levels — from gentle restorative sessions to dynamic vinyasa flows.

about.heading: Yoga as a way of life
about.body: At PureYoga, we believe yoga is more than a practice — it's a path. Whether you're stepping onto the mat for the first time or deepening a lifelong journey, our studio offers a space to breathe, move, and connect.

values.title: Holistic Wellness
values.desc: Mind, body, and spirit in harmony through mindful practice.

values.title: Community First
values.desc: A welcoming space for every body, background, and ability level.

values.title: Expert Guidance
values.desc: Certified instructors with decades of combined teaching experience.

values.title: Inner Peace
values.desc: Stress reduction and emotional balance through breath and movement.

classes.name: Vinyasa Flow
classes.desc: Dynamic sequences linking breath to movement for strength and flexibility.

classes.name: Yin Yoga
classes.desc: Long-held poses targeting deep connective tissue for profound release.

classes.name: Hatha Basics
classes.desc: Foundational postures and alignment principles for new practitioners.

classes.name: Power Yoga
classes.desc: A vigorous, fitness-based approach building core strength and endurance.

classes.name: Restorative
classes.desc: Deeply restful practice using props for complete nervous system reset.

classes.name: Meditation
classes.desc: Guided mindfulness and breathwork to cultivate inner stillness.

benefits.title: Flexibility
benefits.desc: Increase range of motion and ease of movement in daily life.

benefits.title: Strength
benefits.desc: Build functional muscle tone through bodyweight resistance.

benefits.title: Breathwork
benefits.desc: Master pranayama techniques for calm and focus.

benefits.title: Better Sleep
benefits.desc: Regulate your nervous system for deeper, more restful nights.

benefits.title: Mental Clarity
benefits.desc: Reduce anxiety and sharpen focus through mindful practice.

benefits.title: Community
benefits.desc: Find your tribe in a supportive, judgment-free environment.

pricing.name: Drop-In
pricing.desc: Perfect for visitors or those exploring different styles.

pricing.name: Monthly Unlimited
pricing.desc: Our most popular option for dedicated practitioners.

pricing.name: Class Pack
pricing.desc: Flexible access that fits your schedule and lifestyle.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.quote: PureYoga transformed my relationship with my body. The instructors are incredible — patient, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring.

testimonials.name: James L.
testimonials.quote: I was skeptical at first, but after three months of weekly classes I've never felt better. My back pain is gone and my mind is clearer.

testimonials.name: Priya R.
testimonials.quote: The community here is unlike anything I've experienced. It feels like a second home — welcoming, warm, and always uplifting.

cta.heading: Begin your journey today
cta.subheading: Your first class is on us. No experience needed — just show up and breathe.

contact.heading: Come find us
contact.subheading: We'd love to welcome you to our studio. Drop us a message or just show up.
